title: NIGHTFALL PROTOCOL II — Deep Cover
tagline: Five ops. Cameras, dogs, locked vaults. Vanish unseen.
blurb: The cone-and-shadow stealth core, expanded: a 5-mission campaign with rotating cameras, investigators, a pursuit dog, keycard doors, terminal hacks, noise lures, silent takedowns, scoring and a GHOST bonus.

controls.action: Hold to sneak (silent, small profile, hacks faster)
Hold to hack terminal / grab keycard / use door
Silent takedown when behind a guard or dog
Throw a noise lure to draw guards

whatsNew: 5-mission campaign with level select, unlocks and rising complexity
New threats: rotating cameras, an investigator that hunts your last-known spot, and a pursuit dog
Gadgets: thrown noise lure and silent behind-the-back takedowns
Keycard-locked doors plus multi-terminal hack objectives gating the intel
Light/shadow stealth deepened against every watcher type
End-of-mission scoring with letter grades and a no-detection GHOST bonus
